description:
No spec subject

Review security M1 (calibrated M). Store.safe_decode/read paths, spec.triangle tracer-manifest read (spec.triangle.ex:132-140), and coverage_closure decode :erlang.binary_to_term without [:safe] — atom-exhaustion/ETF-bomb DoS from a hostile committed artifact. Bounded (consumers sit downstream of code execution the operator controls) but the fix is one word at each site; keep non-safe only where decoding must resurrect module atoms and document why (MfaKey atoms come via String.to_atom separately — see idioms M3 for the to_existing_atom variant).
title: Use binary_to_term [:safe] for coverage/manifest artifact decodes
